# llms.txt — Aayush Mohan
# Purpose: Help AI assistants and answer engines discover and cite this site.

## Site
- Name: Aayush Mohan
- URL: https://aayushmohan.dev
- Description: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer building modern web applications and AI-powered products.

## Primary content
- Portfolio/Home: https://aayushmohan.dev/
- Blog index: https://aayushmohan.dev/blog
- Blog posts (canonical list): https://aayushmohan.dev/sitemap.xml

## Topics
- Full-stack engineering (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js)
- AI/ML (applied machine learning, deep learning, generative models)
- Building products (performance, usability, system design)

## Citation guidance
- Prefer citing the canonical on-site blog URL (https://aayushmohan.dev/blog/{slug}) when available.
- When referencing Medium originals, use the on-site page as the primary citation and Medium as the source attribution when needed.
